paper_title: Tephrostratigraphy and Magma Evolution Based on Combined Zircon Trace Element and U-Pb Age Data: Fingerprinting Miocene Silicic Pyroclastic Rocks in the Pannonian Basin

methods.method_name: Zircon U-Pb Dating and Trace Element Analysis
methods.description: This method involves the analysis of zircon crystals for U-Pb dating and trace element content using LA-ICP-MS. It is used to determine the age and chemical composition of zircon samples from various geological units.

steps.description: More than 950 zircon crystals were analyzed for U-Pb dating in combination for trace element content from 30 samples.
steps.searchable_summary: collect zircon samples for U-Pb dating and trace element analysis

steps.description: Zircon U-Pb isotopes and trace element contents were analyzed by LA-ICP-MS at the ETH Zürich.
steps.searchable_summary: perform LA-ICP-MS analysis on zircon samples

steps.description: U-Pb dating of zircons was preferably taken on rim parts of the sectioned crystals and for each sample we conducted at least 45 spot analyses on various zircon grains.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct spot analyses on zircon grains for U-Pb dating

steps.description: GJ-1 reference zircon was used as a primary standard, while other reference materials were measured as validation reference materials.
steps.searchable_summary: use reference materials for validation of U-Pb dating

steps.description: For the LA-ICP-MS data reduction, we used IOLITE combined with VizualAge software.
steps.searchable_summary: reduce LA-ICP-MS data using IOLITE and VizualAge

steps.description: The Th disequilibrium correction was performed after alpha dose-correction assuming a constant Th/U partition coefficient ratio.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Th disequilibrium correction on U-Pb data

steps.description: Further data filtering was made using the results of Principal Component Analysis (PCA).

methods.description: Statistical analyses were performed to interpret the collected zircon U-Pb dating and trace element data.

steps.description: Statistical analyses were performed by the NCSS 2020 Software.
